creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 241945
Patch to update emulators/wine-devel from 7.x to 8.4 (v2)

Thank you, Li-Wen.

Looks like I had disabled Wayland in my test builds, and Wayland and
Wine don't go well together yet, so let's explicitly disable this for
the time being (which should address the pkg-plist difference).

In any case a good trigger to make this explicit - one way or the other,
like I have done for essentially all other configure options.
